$schema-description: WHO_I_AM fixture set per specs/003-panel-discovery/contracts/who-i-am-wire-format.md §Fixtures, corrected 15-byte layout: [0] machineType u8, [1..2] fwType u16 big-endian, [3..6]/[7..10]/[11..14] three big-endian u32 UUID words, no padding, length-only reject (FR-007). Each entry carries name, 15-byte hex payload (the malformed entry is intentionally 14 bytes), expected parse outcome, expected machineType/fwType/three-u32-UUID/VariantIdentity, and a provenance `source`. Loaded by Tests/Unit/Can/WhoIAmFrameFixtureTests.fs (T006).

fixtures.name: virgin_panel_12v
fixtures.source: Real bench capture (PCAN-View v6, 2026-06-08): 15-byte WHO_I_AM reassembled from the chunked CAN-ID 0x1FFFFFFF frames in virgin_whoami.trc (raw trace archived under specs/003-panel-discovery/context/captures/). The load-bearing wire-format regression anchor.

fixtures.name: eden_xp
fixtures.source: Synthetic — verified layout, real machineType constant 0x03, synthetic UUID. No real EDEN-XP WHO_I_AM exists (baptized panels do not broadcast WHO_I_AM).

fixtures.name: optimus_xp
fixtures.source: Synthetic — verified layout, real machineType constant 0x0A, synthetic UUID.

fixtures.name: r3l_xp
fixtures.source: Synthetic — verified layout, real machineType constant 0x0B, synthetic UUID.

fixtures.name: eden_bs8
fixtures.source: Synthetic — verified layout, real machineType constant 0x0C, synthetic UUID.

fixtures.name: virgin_panel_24v
fixtures.source: Synthetic — exercises the 24V fwType 0x000F path (machineType 0xFF virgin), synthetic UUID.

fixtures.name: unknown_toplift_a
fixtures.source: Synthetic — TopLift-A machineType 0x08, out of the 4-machine scope, decodes to Unknown 0x08. Synthetic UUID.

fixtures.name: malformed_too_short_14b
fixtures.source: Synthetic — virgin_panel_12v minus its last byte (14 bytes). Length-only reject.
fixtures.reason: Length is 14 bytes — wire contract requires exactly 15 (FR-007 silent drop).
